name: Grineer
summary: The Grineer are a militarized cloning empire known for armor-heavy units and brute-force pressure.
description: Major hostile faction centered around clone soldiery, industry, and expansionist control.

recommendedStatusPlan: Use viral plus slash or heat follow-up for sustained health pressure.
cautions: Pure raw damage without armor handling falls off hard against elite Grineer.
Heavy units skew survivability benchmarks upward.

notes: Faction-level combat tendencies should stay high-level here while exact defense rules live in system and enemy records.
This record is intended to drive matchup guidance rather than exact numeric damage calculations.
